name: Group Data Payload
description: Tests group datagram payload. Same wire format as GRP_TXT but payload type = 0x06. The encrypted plaintext is timestamp(4, LE) followed by an application-defined binary blob.

vectors.description: Group datagram with known channel secret
vectors.notes: Header 0x19 = GRP_DATA(6)+FLOOD(1). Channel hash = SHA256(channel_secret)[0] = 0x72. Inner plaintext is the GRP_DATA format: timestamp 1700000000 (00F15365 LE) + the application-defined blob DEADBEEF0102030405. 13 bytes, AES-128-ECB zero-padded to 16. AES key = first 16 bytes of channel secret; MAC = HMAC-SHA256(channel_secret, ciphertext)[0..1].
